ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( (RecordType.Name = 'Water Lab Test Requisition' && FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'Facility' && FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'Drinking Water System' && FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'Drinking Water Source Intake'),
(RecordType.Name = 'Dye Test Requisition' && (FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'Facility' || NOT(ISPICKVAL(FacilityName__r.Type, 'Sewerage')))),
(RecordType.Name = 'Lead Water Test Requisition' && (FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'Facility' || NOT(ISPICKVAL(FacilityName__r.Type, 'Child Care')))),
(RecordType.Name = 'Radon Test Requisition' && (FacilityName__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'Facility' || NOT(ISPICKVAL(FacilityName__r.Type, 'Child Care')))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Facility is not eligible for this Lab Test Requisition
